dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_origin} sent {quest_threat_the} crashing through {quest_focus_the}. Half our homes are ruined and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_has} nowhere to go.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need someone to {quest_action} before it is too late. {quest_item} have been scattered {location_hint} and we desperately need them recovered. Every piece you bring back is one less family going without.
dialogueChunks.outro: People are cold, scared, and hungry. Every bit you recover could save a life.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} {quest_threat_animate_is} sweeping toward {quest_stakes_the} and nothing we have done has slowed it. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} overwhelmed and we are losing ground fast.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} before {quest_time_pressure}. Collect {quest_item} scattered {location_hint} to help shore up our defenses. The wreckage is full of what we need if someone can get to it.
dialogueChunks.outro: If this reaches the settlement, we lose everything. Every moment counts.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, {player_name}, the danger keeps coming. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} failing, and {quest_stakes_the} could be lost any day.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} before the next wave finishes what the first one started. Gather {quest_item} scattered {location_hint}. The wreckage still holds enough to keep us going if we can recover it in time.
dialogueChunks.outro: Everything has turned against us. But we will not abandon our home without a fight.
